backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for a smart IoT access control system, defining data types (UserAccess, DeviceStatus, AccessEvent, SmartRule, etc.) and managing state maps for devices, users, events, and rules with role-based access control via MixinAuthorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a color palette redesign task targeting CSS custom properties in frontend/src/index.css and frontend/index.css to replace blue/purple accents with emerald green or teal across all themes.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's React component and page structure.
frontend/index.css: Root Tailwind CSS file defining CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes including background, foreground, primary, accent, chart colors, and sidebar variables using OKLCH-style numeric values.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the React app, mounting the app into a #root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app component that sets up TanStack Router with all page routes, wraps the app in QueryClient/ThemeProvider/SimulationProvider, and implements an AuthGate component handling Internet Identity login, profile setup, and onboarding walkthrough.
frontend/src/components/alerts/Emergency: Component that polls access events, detects failed attempts, and displays dismissible alert cards notifying configured emergency contacts of intrusion events.
frontend/src/components/alerts/Intrusion: Banner component that displays a dismissible intrusion alert with timestamp and user info when a recent failed access event is provided.

Displays a list of up to 20 failed access events as intrusion alert cards, each showing user info, method, location, timestamp, and a camera placeholder. Shows an empty state if no failed events exist.
frontend/src/components/analytics/Access: Renders a 7-day × 24-hour heatmap grid of access event frequency using intensity CSS classes derived from utility functions. Includes hour/day labels and a legend.
frontend/src/components/analytics/Advanc: Displays advanced analytics charts including a daily access trend line chart, a per-user success/failure stacked bar chart, and peak hours data using Recharts. Data is derived from access events via memoized utility functions.
frontend/src/components/architecture/Dat: Renders an animated SVG diagram showing data packets flowing between ESP32, Backend (ICP Canister), and Frontend nodes when live mode is active. Packet positions are interpolated along four directional paths using a timer-based animation loop.
frontend/src/components/auth/AutoLogoutW: Modal dialog that warns the user of an impending auto-logout, displaying a countdown in seconds with options to stay logged in or log out immediately.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginForm.t: Full-screen login card that triggers Internet Identity authentication via the useInternetIdentity hook, showing a loading state during the login process.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Full-screen form for new users to enter their name, email, and optional RFID UID to create a profile, submitting via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation with toast feedback.
frontend/src/components/automation/AddRu: Modal dialog form for creating a new smart automation rule with fields for name, action, schedule, and device ID, using the useAddSmartRule mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/automation/GeoFe: UI panel for simulating location-based geo-fencing with a location toggle, radius slider, and auto-unlock toast notification when arriving home.
frontend/src/components/automation/RuleE: Displays a scrollable list of the last 50 smart rule execution log entries with success/failure status, trigger condition, action taken, and timestamp.
frontend/src/components/automation/Rules: Renders a list of configured smart automation rules with their details and provides a confirmation dialog to remove individual rules via useRemoveSmartRule.
frontend/src/components/automation/Vacat: Toggle switch component that enables or disables vacation/holiday mode, suspending all automation rules and activating full lockdown via dedicated mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Connec: Displays an ESP32 connection status badge (Connected/Offline) based on whether the last sync timestamp is within the past 30 seconds.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Contro: Renders Lock, Unlock, and Emergency Lockdown buttons for the dashboard, invoking lock/unlock mutations and showing toast notifications on success or error.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Dragga: Wrapper component that makes any child widget draggable for reordering, showing a grip handle icon on hover and applying visual feedback during drag.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Firmwa: Renders a panel listing all devices with their firmware versions, allowing users to check for and apply simulated firmware updates with a progress bar, using the useUpdateDeviceFirmware mutation on completion.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/LockSt: Displays a large circular icon and label indicating whether the system is currently locked or unlocked, with color-coded styling for each state.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/System: Shows an aggregated system health card with a computed health score gauge plus average temperature, memory usage, and warning/critical device counts derived from current device metrics.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Teleme: Renders a line chart aggregating temperature, CPU, and memory telemetry history across all devices over the last 10 data points using Recharts.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/WiFiSt: Displays a Wi-Fi signal strength row with a labeled icon and percentage, categorizing the signal as strong, medium, or weak based on the provided numeric value.
frontend/src/components/devices/AddDevic: A dialog modal with a form for registering a new ESP32 device by device ID and name, submitting via the useAddDevice mutation with success/error toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/devices/DeviceCa: Displays a card for a single device showing its online status, lock state, WiFi signal, battery, and firmware version, with an admin-only button to toggle the lock state via the useToggleDeviceLock mutation.
frontend/src/components/devices/DeviceHe: Displays a card with device health metrics (uptime, temperature, memory, and signal strength) using color-coded progress bars and a status badge based on thresholds.
frontend/src/components/events/ActivityF: Renders a scrollable list of access events sorted by timestamp, showing user, event type, method, location, and success/failure status with icons and badges.
frontend/src/components/events/Analytics: Displays three Recharts visualizations for access events: a pie chart for success/failure rate, a bar chart for authentication method frequency, and a bar chart for hourly activity patterns.
frontend/src/components/events/EventFilt: Provides two dropdown selects to filter access events by authentication method and user email, deriving unique options from the events array.
frontend/src/components/events/EventSear: A simple search input component with a search icon for filtering events by user, method, or type via a controlled query string.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Renders a site footer with a disclaimer about the ESP32/Wokwi system, copyright year, and a branded link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Sticky navigation header with logo, desktop/mobile nav links, role-based admin link, notification bell with unread count, theme switcher, and user profile dropdown with logout.
frontend/src/components/layout/MainLayou: Root layout component that wraps all pages with a Header, Footer, background pattern overlay, and a TanStack Router Outlet for page content.
frontend/src/components/layout/ThemeSwit: Dropdown menu component that lets users switch between six color themes (dark, light, amber, cyberpunk, midnight, ocean) using the ThemeContext.
frontend/src/components/layout/VacationM: Displays a dismissible warning banner at the top of the page when vacation mode is active, indicating that automation rules are suspended.
frontend/src/components/notifications/No: Renders a bell icon button with an unread count badge that toggles a NotificationDropdown, marking all notifications as read on open and closing on outside clicks.
Displays a dropdown panel of app notifications with category filter tabs, relative timestamps, and per-notification icons, rendered inside a scrollable list.
frontend/src/components/onboarding/Onboa: A multi-step modal walkthrough introducing key app sections (Dashboard, Events, Users, Automation, Settings) with progress dots and skip/next controls.
frontend/src/components/reports/ReportTa: Renders a styled table of report rows showing access success/failure counts and success rate per user per period, with color-coded badges.
frontend/src/components/settings/Emergen: A settings panel for managing up to three emergency contacts stored in localStorage, supporting add and remove operations with basic validation.
frontend/src/components/settings/Simulat: A simple toggle switch component that reads and updates simulation mode state from SimulationContext.
frontend/src/components/settings/TwoFact: A settings card for enabling or disabling demo two-factor authentication via an OTP input, persisting the enabled state to localStorage.
frontend/src/components/settings/Webhook: A settings panel component for configuring webhook forwarding URLs and alert types (intrusion, lockdown, firmware), with localStorage persistence, simulated webhook dispatch, and a delivery log display.
frontend/src/components/users/AccessWind: A dialog modal for viewing and editing a user's per-day access time windows, loading existing schedules from the backend and saving updated TimeSlot arrays via mutation.
frontend/src/components/users/AddUserMod: A dialog form for creating a new user with fields for name, email, RFID UID, PIN, and role, submitting via the useAddUser mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/users/UserList.t: A table component that lists all registered users with their activity metrics, status badges, and admin actions (enable, disable, remove, set access window) fetched from the backend actor.
A React context that provides and persists a boolean simulation mode toggle via localStorage, exposing isSimulationMode and toggleSimulationMode to consumers.
frontend/src/contexts/ThemeContext.tsx: A React context that manages the active UI theme (light, dark, amber, cyberpunk, midnight, ocean), persisting the selection to localStorage and applying it as a data-theme attribute on the document root.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the Internet Identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAutoLogout.ts: A custom hook that tracks user inactivity and triggers an automatic logout after 5 minutes, showing a 60-second countdown warning before logging out and resetting on any user activity.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeviceHealth.ts: Custom hook that simulates and tracks device health metrics (temperature, CPU, memory, uptime) for all devices, updating every 10 seconds and maintaining a rolling history of up to 10 snapshots per device.
frontend/src/hooks/useDraggableWidgets.t: Custom hook that manages drag-and-drop reordering of dashboard widgets, persisting the order to localStorage and providing handlers for drag events.
frontend/src/hooks/useGeoFencing.ts: Custom hook that manages geo-fencing state (location, radius, enabled) with localStorage persistence and toggle/setter helpers.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useNotifications.ts: Custom hook that converts access events and log events into categorized app notifications, tracks read state in localStorage, and exposes unread count and mark-all-read functionality.
frontend/src/hooks/useOnboarding.ts: Custom hook that tracks whether the onboarding walkthrough has been completed using localStorage, exposing a flag and a completion callback.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend actor interactions, including queries and mutations for user profiles, device management, access control, smart rules, and logs.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom property themes (dark, light, amber) for the application's design system.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin-only dashboard page that fetches and displays system-wide stats, device statuses, and user metrics using React Query with auto-refresh. Renders stat cards, per-device status cards with battery/WiFi/lock indicators, and role-gated access.
frontend/src/pages/Architecture.tsx: Static page visualizing the IoT system architecture (ESP32 → ICP → React) with a toggleable live data-flow animation overlay. Includes component description cards for each layer.
frontend/src/pages/AutomationRules.tsx: Admin-only page for managing smart access-control automation rules, showing a list of existing rules, an add-rule modal, and rule execution history. Non-admins see an access-denied alert.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main user dashboard showing live device status, lock state, battery, WiFi, control buttons, system health, telemetry charts, firmware updates, and intrusion/emergency alerts. Polls the backend every 10 seconds.
frontend/src/pages/EventMonitoring.tsx: Event monitoring page with three tabs—Activity Feed, Analytics, and Advanced Analytics—supporting search and filter by method/user across access events fetched via React Query.
frontend/src/pages/Reports.tsx: Reports page that groups access events by week or month, displays summary stat cards, and supports CSV and PDF (print) export. Uses utility helpers for grouping and export logic.
frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx: Settings page component that renders cards for theme appearance, simulation mode toggle, webhook forwarding, and emergency contacts panels.
frontend/src/pages/UserManagement.tsx: Admin-only user management page that displays a list of authorized users and provides a modal for adding new users, with access restricted by role check.
frontend/src/types/accessEvent.ts: Defines the frontend-local AccessEvent interface used to represent access log entries mapped from backend LogEvent data.
frontend/src/utils/analyticsUtils.ts: Utility functions for aggregating AccessEvent data into daily counts over 30 days, per-user success/failure summaries, and top-3 peak hours.
frontend/src/utils/csvExport.ts: Exports an array of ReportRow objects to a CSV file download, with proper escaping and a dated filename.
frontend/src/utils/healthMetricsUtils.ts: Utility functions for computing device health metrics including average temperature, memory usage, warning/critical device counts, and an overall health score.
frontend/src/utils/heatmapUtils.ts: Builds a 7×24 heatmap data structure from AccessEvents, mapping day-of-week and hour to event counts and normalized intensity levels.
frontend/src/utils/reportUtils.ts: Groups AccessEvents into per-user success/failure report rows bucketed by ISO week or calendar month, sorted descending by period.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/src/utils/userActivityUtils.ts: Computes per-user activity metrics (access count, last access timestamp, success rate) from a list of AccessEvents.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, font families (Exo 2, Share Tech Mono), and keyframe animations for the app's design system.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking existing features, a pending color-change request (AR-1), and configuration for the Smart Access Control project.
